title: Longevity
wikitext:
[[File:JayGarrick.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Jay Garrick's connection with the Speed Force slowed his aging, allowing him to operate as a Superhero since the 1960s]]

==Summary==
'''Longevity''' is the ability to age far more slowly than any normal being, allowing the user to have a lifespan that far exceeds any human, sometimes reaching hundreds or thousands of years if not longer.

Unlike characters with [[Immortality|Immortality Type 1]], beings with Longevity do still age, and thus will weaken and eventually die of old age, however long this process may take.

==Users==
*[[Odin (Marvel Comics)|The]] [[Thor (Marvel Comics)|Norse]] [[Loki (Marvel Comics) (Classic)|gods]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Flash (Barry Allen) (Post-Crisis)|Various]] [[Flash (Wally West)|Flashes]] ([[DC Comics]])
*[[Urdnot Wrex]], [[Grunt]] and all krogan ([[Mass Effect]])
*[[Frieren]] ([[Frieren: Beyond Journey's End]])
*[[Predator (Species)|Yautja]] ([[Predator (Franchise)|Predator]])
*[[Greenland Shark]] ([[The Real World]])
